description: Graded NLQ question set. Each question is run through the live loop; the answer is graded by whether it CALLED the expected tool(s) and its text CONTAINS the expected substrings (case-insensitive). Deliberately behavioral, not exact-match: the model's prose varies, its tool plan should not. Run with the bedrock feature + AETHER_BEDROCK_MODEL; never in CI.

questions.ask: how many flights are there right now?
find the flight with callsign SYN0
how many flights are below 3000 meters?
what are the p50 and p99 altitudes?
is the cluster healthy? how many shards answered?
